description: Style NoteCrafted from the softest fabric and styled with high fashion oomph, this pair of night dress from bw!tch contours your every curve and shapes you to give you an effortlessly curvy look. Now that's something worth investing in!Product DetailsGolden night dress with a V-neckline, A-line,  embroidered lace at the neckline and empire-line,  thin and adjustable shoulder straps, curved hemMaterial and Care100%PolyesterHand wash, drip dry in shadeDo not wring, iron, bleachWash dark colours separately
